form.formComment: Good effort at double-figure odds last time when third (23.37) over 390m at Ballarat. Gets the rails draw this time. Has to do a bit more.

formComments.title: TAB

form.formComment: Has been in the minor money the last two runs, the latest at big odds finishing second (22.98) at this track. Drawn close to the inside. One of the better hopes.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Has been in the minor money the last two runs, the latest at big odds finishing second (22.98) at this track. Drawn close to the inside. One of the better hopes.

form.formComment: Was out of the placings last time but the start prior finished in the minors when third (23.92) over 410m at Horsham. Draws an inside box and in the mix on his best form.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Was out of the placings last time but the start prior finished in the minors when third (23.92) over 410m at Horsham. Draws an inside box and in the mix on his best form.

form.formComment: Has only been in the placings once from eight starts. Last raced when fourth over 390m at Shepparton four days ago. Hard to have this time.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Has only been in the placings once from eight starts. Last raced when fourth over 390m at Shepparton four days ago. Hard to have this time.

form.formComment: Was out of placings last time when fourth (24.26) at Horsham in a Maiden. Will jump from box 6 for the first time. Expected to go close.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Was out of placings last time when fourth (24.26) at Horsham in a Maiden. Will jump from box 6 for the first time. Expected to go close.

form.formComment: Was sent out long odds last time but charged out of the boxes with a fast early sectional and gave a sight before being swallowed up late, finishing a 2.75 lengths fourth (26.26) over 450m at Ballarat. Rates highly on best form. Expected to feature.

form.formComment: Modest effort last time out when fourth over 400m at Geelong. Looking to others this time.
